# Stylized Dog -- HDRP

This package contains a stylized dog character designed for real‑time
applications in Unity.\
The model includes a custom rig and a set of basic locomotion and idle
animations suitable for games, simulations, and interactive projects.

This documentation applies to all individual dog packs from the Stylized
Dogs series.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Unity Compatibility

Render Pipeline: **High Definition Render Pipeline (HDRP)**\
Unity Version: **6.3 or higher**

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Character Features

Each dog pack includes:

• One stylized dog model\
• Custom character rig\
• Animation clips\
• Unity prefab ready to place in a scene\
• HDRP materials\
• 2K textures

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Animations

The following animations are included with each character:

• Idle Breathing\
• Idle Playing\
• Run\
• Run Lean Left\
• Run Lean Right\
• Walk\
• Walk Turn Left\
• Walk Turn Right

Animations are imported and configured for Unity.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Technical Details

Polycount: **Approximately 2,000 -- 5,600 triangles depending on the dog
breed**\
Texture Resolution: **2K PNG**\
Rig: **Custom character rig**

Textures included:

• Albedo / Base Color\
• Normal Map\
• Mask Map (HDRP)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# File Format

The package includes:

• FBX model file\
• Unity prefab\
• HDRP material setup\
• Animation clips\
• Textures (PNG, 2K)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Setup Instructions

1.  Import the package into your Unity project.
2.  Make sure your project uses **HDRP**.
3.  Navigate to the **Prefabs** folder.
4.  Drag the dog prefab into your scene.

Animations are ready to use and can be connected to an **Animator
Controller**.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Notes

• Models are optimized for real‑time applications.\
• Designed for stylized games and interactive experiences.\
• Animation clips are provided separately for easy use with custom
animator setups.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Support

If you encounter issues or have questions about the asset, please
contact the publisher via the Unity Asset Store support page.
